notes.en: [[character:diluc]]'s constellations boost his [[ability:skill]] damage, so talent prioritization can vary from player to player.
notes.fr: Les constellations de [[character:diluc]] buff les dégâts de son [[ability:skill]], la priorité des talents peut varier d'un jouer à l'autre.
notes.it: Le costellazioni di [[character:diluc]] aumentano i danni inflitti dalla sua [[ability:skill]] e di conseguenza la rilevanza del Talento corrispondente.
